arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool identify affordable Alexander Isak alternative to bolster attack
arts.sum: Liverpool are expected to make signing a new striker in the summer their priority. While they have faced no issues in scoring goals this season, it is largely down to the brilliant form of Mohamed Salah. The Egyptian attacker is currently having the best season of his career at Anfield and he is the single […] The post Report: Liverpool identify affordable Alexander Isak alternative to bolster attack appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: The £15million Newcastle United star who feared St James' Park time was up now on cusp of Wembley
arts.sum: Last season was an even bigger nightmare for Targett as a hamstring injury suffered before he'd kicked a ball in a Carabao Cup win at Man United curtailed his campaign before it had barely begun. The Eastleigh-born 29-year-old has suffered badly with injuries and downright bad luck in the last three seasons with heel issues, hamstring trouble and Achilles agony costing him dearly.

arts.ttl: Hugo Ekitike hits out after turning down Newcastle United transfer
arts.sum: Although Ekitike admitted he would have been'stupid' if he had not learned from training alongside some of the best players in the world at PSG, the 22-year-old did not progress like he had hoped. Hugo Ekitike has claimed PSG did not help him to 'do better' after the Frenchman turned down a move to Newcastle United to join the Parisian giants.

arts.sum: Hammers will feel confident about beating Toon Army again

arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer state of play as priority clear and £20m deal getting closer
arts.sum: Lloyd Kelly departed the club in January on an initial loan deal but Italian side Juventus have an obligation to buy the former Bournemouth star for £20m come the summer. Newcastle's backline options currently look thin on the ground but even if Howe had all assets available to him there is still a nagging feeling that a new arrival is needed in that particular position.

arts.ttl: Ex-Newcastle United striker Aleksandar Mitrovic rushed to hospital after 'stress-related heart issue'
arts.sum: It comes less than two days after their 2-0 win over Al Feiha with Mitrovic on target in his first game back from a hamstring injury. The 30-year-old continued his form in the Middle East after establishing himself as a key player for Fulham following a frustrating period at St James' Park - where he scored 17 goals in 72 outings.
